zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD处于极窄幅横盘整理结构，价格围绕1674附近徘徊，日内波动极低，市场缺乏明确方向，多空力量暂时均衡，但略显承压

从均线结构看，现价持续运行于SMA20下方，短期均线压制明显。MACD动能柱为负值且未见拐头，空头动能仍占据主导但力度有限整体偏弱震荡短线延续承压

支撑位方面，下方1673为近期密集成交低点，若跌破或将测试更低区间；上方1678附近SMA20形成短线阻力需关注突破确认

交易上建议保持观望或轻仓区间操作，未有效突破SMA20前不宜追多，反弹靠近阻力可考虑短线高抛低吸严格控制风险波动较低为主

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum () is currently trading in an extremely tight consolidation band around 1,674, reflecting a market in balance with very low intraday volatility. Price action remains marginally subdued beneath the 20-period simple moving average, suggesting a short-term bearish bias despite the absence of strong directional momentum. The broader structure indicates a range-bound phase following recent directional exhaustion, where neither buyers nor sellers have established clear dominance.

Momentum indicators reinforce this cautious tone. The MACD reading at -0.105 signals mild bearish momentum, though the lack of a corresponding signal line limits confirmation strength. With RSI data unavailable, price behavior and moving averages become primary guides. Trading below the SMA(20) at 1,678.99 suggests that short-term sellers retain slight control, but the flat price profile implies weakening conviction rather than aggressive downside pressure.

Key technical levels remain tightly clustered due to the compressed trading range. Immediate support is observed near the session low at 1,673.12, with a secondary buffer around the psychological 1,670 zone, which may attract short-term dip buyers. On the upside, resistance aligns closely with the SMA(20) at 1,678.99, followed by a stronger ceiling near 1,685 where prior rejection zones and liquidity pockets may emerge.

From a trading perspective, conditions favor range strategies over breakout positioning until volatility expands. Short-term traders may consider buying near support with tight risk controls below 1,670, while taking partial profits into resistance around the SMA(20). A sustained break above 1,685 would be required to shift bias toward recovery momentum, whereas a breakdown below 1,670 could accelerate bearish continuation toward lower support zones.
